states.name: California
states.medicalDebtCollection: California limits aggressive collection on medical debt and provides for hospital fair pricing for low-income patients.
states.balanceBilling: AB 72 prohibits balance billing by out-of-network providers at in-network facilities.

states.name: New York
states.medicalDebtCollection: New York caps interest on medical debt judgments and shortens the statute of limitations for medical debt suits.
states.balanceBilling: New York surprise billing law applies to emergency services and assistant providers at in-network facilities.
citations: New York Financial Services Law Article 6

states.name: Texas
states.medicalDebtCollection: Texas requires itemized billing on request and provides specific timelines for billing after discharge.
states.balanceBilling: Texas SB 1264 prohibits balance billing for emergency services and out-of-network providers at in-network facilities.
